subagent_rows.reason: The selective veto rearranged the burden map, so the next step is to localize exactly which drawdown windows improved and which symbols became the new pressure points.
Before opening another branch, the replay should explain whether the new frontier gain is robust across windows or just transfers pain from one symbol set to another.
Window-level attribution is now the highest-value cut because symbol-level totals already show a burden transfer from the old drag trio to 601698 and 000738.
